programme.title: History Documentary
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: America'S War On Drugs
programme.desc: (MA) After 9/11, heroin lords and terrorists forge an unholy alliance. Afghanistan is a Narco state. El Chapo goes on the run. Big Pharma becomes the new big drug lord.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World
programme.desc: (PG) Ralph Baer invents the world's first home video game console which is soon eclipsed by a new table tennis game.

programme.title: The Engineering That Built The World
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
